selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest remaining work-surface entropy escalation packet on the controller action board.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the entropy overlay, mass-shell, selector, and quota packet tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.
